meaning: adj.东罗马帝国的,拜占庭式的n.拜占庭人,拜占庭派的建筑师,画家
examples: There are also several well-preserved Byzantine frescoes.
In fact, the revival of Byzantine learning may itself have influenced the subsequent economic and military expansion.
To consider the Byzantine military, cultural, and economic advances as differentiated aspects of a single phenomenon is reasonable.
Some check-offs are byzantine, allowing an extensive list of possible programs to which taxpayers can contribute.
For its part, Komotini offers an intriguing archaeological museum and Byzantine and Ottoman structures.
